$schema_note: Soviet part <-> modern part <-> KiCad symbol/footprint <-> SimulIDE class <-> timing. First-class artifact: drives both substitution (spec §3) and the KiCad<->SimulIDE bridge (spec §7). Parameters cited in docs/datasheets/README.md; values marked 'to confirm' are not yet from a primary datasheet.

classes.1: Pure Boolean logic — zero state risk, free to swap to 74ALS/74HC
classes.2: DRAM — high timing risk, model with real RU5 timing
classes.3: Pixel shift registers — subtle setup/hold, keep LS-family timing
classes.4: Video-output transistors — analog levels, keep KT315/KT361
classes.5: Tape input conditioning — analog comparator (К544СА3); keep equivalent analog behavior

parts.simulide_class: TV80 or A-Z80 soft core (behavioral, sim only)

timing.notes: RAS-before-CAS; WAIT generator tuned to slow Soviet timing

parts.modern: 4-bit parallel-load shift register, LS family (keep LS timing)

timing.notes: deliberate LS choice; ALS would inflate margin ~3x; clocked at 14 MHz

parts.topology: PE(load)/SI(serial)/C(clk)/OE(3-state), D0-D3 -> Q0-Q3 (pins 13/12/11/10); 14-pin. D39(VD0-3)+D40(VD4-7)=8-bit pixel shifter; D45=colour out.
parts.correction: Earlier mapped to 74LS165 (8-bit/16-pin); the redraw symbol + power table prove 4-bit/14-pin. Verified 2026-06-14.
parts.status: topology confirmed; western part-number to finalize

params.note: SCART mod uses 200 ohm sync resistor; 100 ohm loses color

parts.role: Tape-IN comparator (D49) — squares the analog tape signal to digital
parts.topology: inputs W1/W2, outputs QK/QE, strobe C, supplies +U1/-U2; R37 1.8M feedback, R38 3k.
parts.correction: Spec/earlier map said 'К5545АЗ ≈ LM567 tone decoder'. The actual part on the board (D49) is К544СА3, an analog COMPARATOR — not a tone decoder. Verified from the redraw 2026-06-14.

parts.role: Floppy disk controller (TR-DOS / Beta Disk daughterboard)
